hotel_name: Khách sạn Minasi Premium (Minasi Premium Hotel)

reviews.title: Poor experience
reviews.text:
My stay at this hotel was a significant disappointment, particularly due to the high cost resulting from a booking error and the poor handling of the situation.
I had accidentally booked my stay for the wrong date (the following day). When I requested assistance from the staff to change the dates for the current night, I was instructed to make an entirely new reservation. Unfortunately, only more expensive rooms were available.

The booking platform (Agoda) indicated they could refund  the mistakenly booked night, but they required confirmation from the hotel. The hotel flatly refused the refund. Crucially, I would not have made the new, more expensive reservation if I had known that the hotel would refuse to refund for the incorrect booking. When I inquired further, the hotel staff claimed the decision was entirely up to Agoda, despite Agoda having already expressed their willingness to proceed. 

Furthermore, the quality of the accommodation did not match the price. Although I paid for a 
 "better" room, the window offered zero view, facing directly onto a solid stone wall. Finally, the breakfast offered was very average and not worth mentioning.

In conclusion, I cannot recommend this hotel. The high final cost, poor customer service in resolving the booking issue, and substandard room quality led to a highly negative experience.

reviews.title: I will not come back
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Very noisy, nothing like the pictures, facilities are old (toilet and bathroom), some furniture in the room were new but all the rest 👎🏻

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The parking lot is too far from the hotel. Added water and munchies aren’t served and facilities are quite spare.

reviews.title: Decent place in nice area
reviews.positives: Friendly and well-trained staff. Great view on Hanoi from higher floors. Located in a nice area that feels a bit more local and less crazy than Old Quarter.
reviews.negatives: The bathroom could be cleaner - particularly the tap could use a bit more care (but I see this quite a lot in Vietnam). Also you can see that the hotel is a bit worn out - walls in the restaurant need refreshing, tap and shower head could be updated to modern standards.

reviews.title: Enjoyed staying here
reviews.text: Breakfast very good

reviews.title: We had one night in Hanoi and this hotel was very convenient. Great spot to sleep.
reviews.positives: The shower was great, and the location was very convenient. We only stayed one night but we have no regrets. It was a relaxing space.
reviews.negatives: It feels a bit dark and dated.

reviews.title: Needs maintenance
reviews.text: Older facility which was built with low quality materials to begin with. Broken window mechanics mean you hear everything from the noisy street. Imitation marble, artificial leather, everything looks high quality on photos but is cheap plastic in real life. Overpriced small room. Friendly reception and breakfast staff nevertheless. Hanoi hotel management should go to Hoi An and learn the profession.

reviews.title: My stay is awesome, feel comfortable and safe! i will recommend this hotel and will come back again!
reviews.positives: The property is very clean and aircon is working well. I like also the staff who are all very friendly and helpful. Show concern specially when we can't find bookworm store they encourage us that the store is near and we were able to find the store.
reviews.negatives: Suggest to put a toilet at the lobby for the convenience of the guests instead of going back to the room.

reviews.title: CSVC
reviews.text: Cách âm, trần không tốt, tiếng động bên ngoài ảnh hưởng tới sự nghỉ ngơi của khách

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: We liked: location, quietness in the room, room was clean, breakfast was great.

reviews.title: A bit disappointed
reviews.text:
Booked a twin room, but the room got offered to 2 foreigners instead so we had to accept a room with 1 bed. After receiving our requests again, they then offered to separate the 1 bed into two (same room) but it still doesn’t make amends to the bad first impression. They could have tried to rearrange in advance or do something as  they could not offer the correct room type in the first place.
Location was good.
Everything else was acceptable.
reviews.response:
Dear Lâm,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience regarding your room arrangement upon arrival. Your comments are absolutely valid — we should have handled the situation better to avoid the initial disappointment.

Please rest assured that we’ve reviewed this issue with our front office team to ensure proper room allocation and better communication in the future.

We truly appreciate your understanding and are glad to hear that you were otherwise satisfied with our location and overall service.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a smoother and more pleasant experience next time.

Warm regards,
Minasi Premium Hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Magnus Tony and Kelly were extremely helpful

reviews.title: I expect more
reviews.text: The place is generally okay and some staffs are friendly like Matt, Quenny and her partner I forgot the name of other guy. But others are not that we request for bottle of water and they always make us feel like we need to explain why we need it and up to our last check out time they didn't gave us water for drinking.

reviews.title: Comfortable and great location!
reviews.positives: Super comfortable! Joyce was super helpful and great to help arrange all of our plans. Highly recommend! Good breakfast too.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Not a bad experience at this hotel though breakfast is limited

reviews.title: Amazing stay at well located hotel with lovely staff (thank you Joyce!)
reviews.positives: We had a wonderful time at the Minasi hotel. The location was perfect, the rooms were clean and comfortable, and the staff were absolutely lovely. We were checked in and welcomed by Joyce, who was extremely helpful and friendly throughout the stay, offering us recommendations for food and things to visit that were not so touristy. She even left us a lovely surprise note to wish us a good rest of our trip in Vietnam. Thank you Joyce, we are really grateful for your kindness and hospitality! :)

reviews.title: Rooms are too small
reviews.text:
Location is great, lobby looks grand, breakfast staff is very helpful but that's all there is to premium.

Sorry but the rooms are too small almost claustrophobic. suitable for only 1 at most. can't even open a 28" suitcase. toilets are puny and fittings are old. washbasin has nowhere for any toiletries. bed is hard. very unpremium. at its location, any room with windows with get full blare of honking from 6am to midnight. It has a premium looking lobby. that's all to it. Everything else is 2star really.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Joyce gives us a lovely postcard as a gift! Very sweet experience.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is good but they pressure the customers to leave a 5-star review when they check out, so that's why the current reviews are so high. The location is great, the rooms are good, the breakfast only fine. They really need to clean these coffee pots.
reviews.response:
Dear Kevin,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your 2-night stay in April 2026. We are pleased that you rated your overall experience an 8.0/10 and gave us full marks for our Location (10/10). We are also glad to hear you found the rooms good and the service satisfactory (8/10 for both).

We truly appreciate your honesty regarding the areas needing improvement.

Firstly, we sincerely apologize if you felt any pressure to leave a high rating upon check-out. This is absolutely not our policy, and we take your comments on our review request process very seriously. We will address this immediately with our Front Office team to ensure we respect our guests' privacy and choice in leaving feedback.

Secondly, we note your concerns regarding the Facilities (rated 6/10) and specifically the cleanliness of the coffee pots. We are immediately escalating this specific housekeeping issue to our Executive Housekeeper for immediate review and retraining of the cl

reviews.title: Topnotch location and staff ~
reviews.positives: Location, location, location!  Quenny & Magnus checked me in & even provided a complementary room upgrade.  Quenny again greeted me with her warm sincere smile and gracious help the following morning & Joyce welcomed me back that evening as if I was an old family friend, giving me a complete description of the weekend’s special offerings/events). Operation Mgr Matt runs a clean facility with obliging staff. Without exception, Minasi Premium Hotel (I can’t speak to the hotels’ other lodgings) offered incredible hospitality and special personal touches that made me feel very welcome.  Delicious buffet breakfast spread was included, where I could eat at my leisure while enjoying an incredible view.  Room was simple and attractive and pillows/bed were very comfortable. Great hot water & water pressure.  Every request/inquiry was promptly addressed, and if infectiously happy staff is an indicator of a hotel’s success, I would say Minasi is as good as it gets (I’m staying in another ‘fancier’ lodging tomorrow, but wish the group I’m meeting would instead  consider Minasi Premium.)

reviews.title: If you are looking for a peaceful stay.
reviews.text:
The staff is always friendly and welcoming, which makes me, as someone staying alone, feel relieved and happy. 

I think the room and the bed were clean and nice. The bathroom curtain had a bit of a weird smell, but it's at a level where I don’t think I need to be too picky. 

It's not just this hotel, but in Vietnam, the toilets are different, which is something I, coming from Japan, found a bit unfamiliar. The sound of the bidet shower can be heard from all around at all times, which was a bit annoying, but I suppose it's a good experience nonetheless. 

There are many restaurants and convenience stores around the hotel. It feels a bit quieter compared to the areas around Hoan Kiem Lake.
reviews.response:
Dear はな,

Thank you very much for sharing your detailed feedback about your stay at Minasi Premium Hotel. We’re delighted to hear that our staff’s friendly greetings and service made you feel comfortable during your solo stay.

We appreciate your comments regarding the bathroom and shower experience, and we will review these points carefully to improve guest comfort. We’re glad that you enjoyed the quiet location and convenient surroundings with many restaurants and shops.

Your feedback is very valuable to us, and we hope to welcome you back for an even better experience on your next visit to Hanoi.

Warm regards,
Minasi Premium Hotel Team

reviews.title: Satisfaction.
reviews.positives: More eating and entertainment options are available in this location. The room was clean, and the bathtub provided us with a relaxing experience. Breakfast was satisfactory. Staff member Ly assisted me with refunding money after I transferred it 10 times by mistake.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Great Stay Overall
reviews.text: The hotel's central location was perfect for shopping and exploring on foot. The breakfast offered was delightful, and the Wi-Fi service exceeded expectations. The staff were friendly and the facilities top-notch, contributing to a comfortable and pleasant stay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La atención del personal.
reviews.negatives: Falta de mantenimiento. Las habitaciones parecen más grandes en la foto, aunque nos cambiaron de habitación ya que tenían disponibilidad. Lo agradecimos mucho.

reviews.title: The central location of the Old Quarter in Hanoi for first-time visitors.
reviews.text: The price is a bit high compared to other hotels in Hanoi, but the street in front of the hotel is easy to park on. The hotel room was not affected by noise. The breakfast had a wide variety and was delicious. It was helpful that the refrigerator had a freezer, which is rare in hotels in Vietnam. I forgot my jacket in the room at checkout, but the staff noticed and brought it to me, and I made it just in time even though the taxi had already arrived. Staff members Tony and Kelly were kind and took good care of me.
reviews.response:
Dear Takashi,

Thank you very much for choosing Minasi Premium Hotel during your business trip to Hanoi and for sharing your detailed feedback. We are honored to be your choice in the heart of the Old Quarter.

We are delighted to hear that you found our location convenient for taxi access and that your room provided the quiet environment necessary for a productive stay. It is also wonderful to know you enjoyed the variety of our breakfast and found the in-room freezer useful—we take pride in offering those small, unique conveniences that make a difference.

A very special thank you from Tony and Kelly! They were so happy to assist you, especially in ensuring your jacket was returned to you before your taxi departed. Our team is committed to such attentive service, and your recognition means a lot to them.

We have officially shared your praise with Tony, Kelly, and our entire management team. We look forward to welcoming you back to your "Hanoi home" on your next business trip!

Best

reviews.title: Satisfactoria
reviews.positives: La atención personalizada de su equipo
reviews.negatives: La apariencia con poco mantenimiento

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Location: I was satisfied with the reasonable price, as it was within a comfortable walking distance to the old town area.  
Staff: They helped me by storing my luggage since I wanted to explore until it was time to check out.  
Room: I was satisfied with the ample space. However, while there were no major issues, there were a few points of concern.  
First, the flow of water in the toilet was a bit poor and required a technique to flush properly. Additionally, the bathtub was not able to hold the plug, so I couldn't fill it with water. There were also cockroach larvae in the bathtub, which became the first task to remove after I arrived in the room.  
Moreover, the room did not have any windows, making it feel somewhat dim.

reviews.title: Muy aceptable
reviews.positives: La atención personalizada
reviews.negatives: La ubicación, un poco difícil de caminar por los comerciantes

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
What truly distinguished this hotel, however, was the exceptional quality of its staff. I would like to extend special appreciation to Tony, Kelly, and Magnus for their outstanding professionalism and dedication. Tony consistently demonstrated attentiveness and courtesy, always ready to assist with any request. Kelly’s warm and gracious demeanor created a genuinely welcoming atmosphere, while Magnus impressed with his efficiency and meticulous attention to detail, ensuring that every aspect of the stay was handled flawlessly.
Their collective efforts significantly enhanced the overall guest experience, reflecting a high standard of hospitality that is both commendable and memorable.
I would highly recommend Minasi Premium Hotel to anyone visiting Hanoi and would not hesitate to return in the future.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Alexandra,

Thank you very much for your kind and thoughtful review of your recent stay at Minasi Premium Hotel. We are truly delighted to learn that you had such a positive experience with us.

Your special recognition of our team members—Tony, Kelly, and Magnus—is sincerely appreciated. It is wonderful to know that Tony’s attentiveness, Kelly’s warm hospitality, and Magnus’s efficiency and attention to detail all contributed to making your stay memorable. We will be sure to share your encouraging words with them, as it serves as great motivation for our entire team to continue delivering exceptional service.

Your recommendation means a great deal to us. We are honored to have been part of your visit to Hanoi and are thrilled to know that you would choose to stay with us again.

We look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.

Warm regards,
The Management Team
Minasi Premium Hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La estancia fue cómoda y Kelly y Joyce fueron muy amables en el trato.

reviews.title: Great places to stay in Da Nang.
reviews.text:
Advantages: Good location, friendly attitude of the staff, infinity pool, great for photography, beautiful sea view rooms.

Disadvantages: Many details are not in place, hotels should have a product manager's mindset, should understand what customers need and what services should be provided. It's not about waiting for customers to approach you and then being unable to solve the problems.
reviews.response:
Dear Pei,

Thank you for staying at Minasi Premium Hotel and for sharing such detailed feedback regarding your recent visit. We are thrilled to receive your 10/10 scores for our location and the service provided by our team.

It is wonderful to hear that you enjoyed our infinity pool and found our ocean-view rooms beautiful and perfect for photography. We aim to provide a visually stunning and welcoming environment for all our guests.

However, we also sincerely value your candid feedback regarding the "Product Manager" mindset. You are absolutely right—true hospitality is about anticipating a guest's needs before they have to ask, rather than simply reacting to problems. We apologize that we fell short on the finer details during your stay. Your perspective is incredibly helpful, and our management team will use your comments to refine our service standards and proactive care.

We hope to have the chance to welcome you back and demonstrate the improvements inspired by your stay.

Best

reviews.title: Tranquilidad dentro de Hanoi
reviews.positives: Alojamiento bien ubicado cerca del centro pero a la vez un poco apartado del bullicio del centro se Hanoi, las instalaciones son más que correctas y el personal es super agradable.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Small boutique hotel. Good location with minimal facilities. Good for a short stay and no-frills offering if you need a central location.

reviews.title: Excelente
reviews.positives: Muy buena calidad todo limpio y bonito. Vistas muy buenas.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Vị trí ở phố cổ thuận tiện ăn chơi, nv hỗ trợ kịp thời. Tuy nhiên phòng hơi bé (đặc trưng các ks trong khu vực này), cách âm hơi ko tốt và mình ko thích việc nvs chỉ có thể tắm trong bồn. Cửa sổ nhìn xuống đường phố khá thích. Mình ko dùng bữa sáng do muốn trải nghiệm đồ ăn địa phương nên ko biết như nào nhưng có nhìn qua 1 xíu cũng khá đa dạng.
reviews.response:
Chào chị Phương,

Thay mặt Ban Quản lý khách sạn Minasi Premium, xin chân thành cảm ơn chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những phản hồi rất chi tiết sau kỳ nghỉ 2 đêm tại phòng Deluxe của chúng tôi!

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết chị hài lòng với vị trí thuận tiện tại phố cổ, tầm nhìn từ cửa sổ xuống đường phố cũng như sự hỗ trợ kịp thời từ đội ngũ nhân viên.

Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn cũng xin ghi nhận những góp ý rất chân thành của chị:

Về diện tích phòng & cách âm: Do đặc thù kiến trúc trong khu vực phố cổ, không gian thường được tối ưu hóa, tuy nhiên chúng tôi đang nghiên cứu các giải pháp cải thiện vật liệu cách âm để mang lại sự riêng tư tốt hơn cho khách hàng.

Về thiết kế nhà vệ sinh: Chúng tôi hiểu rằng việc tắm trong bồn có thể gây một chút bất tiện so với khu vực tắm đứng riêng biệt. Ý kiến của chị là cơ sở quan trọng để chúng tôi xem xét cải tiến trong các đợt nâng cấp sắp tới.

Hy vọng trong lần tới ghé thăm Hà Nội, chị sẽ dành chút thời gian trải nghiệm bữa sáng tại khách sạn, chú

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: El trato del personal súper amables, Joyce ha sido un encanto.
reviews.negatives: Nada

reviews.title: It was very good.
reviews.text: The location is good for sightseeing, the room was clean, and the breakfast was also nice. The staff's response was very good as well. They were happy to print out my flight tickets. I had some complaints about the soundproofing in the room, but overall I recommend it.
reviews.response: Thank you for your insightful feedback. We are always dedicated to improving the standard of our services and creating memorable experiences for our customers.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Les jeunes à l'acceuil Magnus et Joyce. Aimable et très  serviables.

reviews.title: Pleasan stay with Minasi Premium Hotel
reviews.text: As a couple, we stayed for 3 nights in this Hotel. It was a pleasant stay. The staff is extremely courteous and professional taking good care of guests. The hotel is centrally located with easy access to all the places of tourist attractions. The options for Indian vegetarian food are not much in the breakfast which is the only flip  side of the Hotel.
reviews.response: Thank you for your insightful feedback. We are always dedicated to improving the standard of our services and creating memorable experiences for our customers.

reviews.title: Hôtel avec bonne relation qualité - prix.
reviews.positives:
Belle chambre spacieuse et calme.
Lit un peu dur.
Personnel très aimable.
Le massage proposé était excellant.
reviews.negatives: Le petit déjeuner pourrait être plus varié, du moins pour les européens. Très bons fruits.

reviews.title: Not Bad
reviews.text: Not bad for the price.  I would recommend this property.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Hotel bien localisé, propre, personnel très accueillant et serviable

reviews.title: Clean and cost-effective hotel.
reviews.text: There are many old and narrow hotels in Hoan Kiem Old Quarter, and this place was reasonably comfortable, not too far from the city center, which was nice. I used a room with a window thanks to a free upgrade, and overall it was clean, so I would consider staying here again. I chose this hotel because of the bathtub, and although it was a bit worn, the hot water worked well and I made good use of it. However, the bed was a bit hard. I personally didn't mind and slept well, but just a note for others.

reviews.title: Séjour très agréable.
reviews.positives:
L'équipe de l'hôtel a été attentionnée et bienveillante. Elle nous a donné de bons conseils également sur les lieux  intéressants à visiter et comment s'y rendre.
Un grand merci à son manager Tony, à son équipe de jour Kelly et Harry ainsi que son équipe de nuit qui a su répondre à nos demandes de même que le personnel pour le petit déjeuner.
Je recommande vivement.

reviews.title: Nice and compact hotel
reviews.text: It is a bit noisy in the morning due to nearby school and trucks around but it is ok
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback. We are pleased to know that you had an overall comfortable stay with us.

We also appreciate your comments regarding the morning noise. Your feedback is very valuable to us as it helps us better understand our guests’ experience and continue improving our service.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back to Minasi Premium Hotel in the future.

Best regards,
The Management Team
Minasi Premium Hotel

reviews.title: Séjour très agréable
reviews.positives:
J'étais très content du service et de la prestation de l'équipe de l'hôtel, notamment du manager Tony, Kelly et Harry qui ont su répondre à nos demandes tout en restant attentionné.
Je recommande.

reviews.title: Ok stay
reviews.text: It is worth our time here, and the area is convenient
reviews.response:
Dear Dang,

Thank you very much for your excellent review and for giving us a perfect 10.0/10 score for your stay in March 2026!

We are delighted to hear that you found your stay worthwhile and appreciated the convenience of our location, especially as a business traveler staying in our Superior Room (No Window). Your perfect ratings across Cleanliness, Value for money, Service, and Facilities truly motivate our entire team.

We are committed to providing excellent service and convenient stays for all our business guests. We sincerely hope to welcome you back to Minasi Premium Hotel on your next business trip to the area.

Warm regards,
The Management Team
Minasi Premium Hotel

reviews.title: c'était très agréable
reviews.positives: Le personnel ainsi que Mr Tony, Kelly and Harry ont été d'une précieuse attention à notre égard et je les remercie pour leur professionnalisme

reviews.title: Good Staff and Clean Hotel
reviews.text: Staff named Magnus and Ella, I endorsed their customer services. Good Staffs.
reviews.response:
Dear Naing,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your wonderful feedback and for giving us a perfect 10.0/10 score across every category!

We are absolutely thrilled to hear you had an excellent stay in our Premium Room, and we will immediately pass along your heartfelt praise to Magnus and Ella. They will be so delighted to know their attentive customer service stood out to you during your 2-night visit in April 2026.

It means the absolute world to our entire team to know we could deliver a clean, comfortable, and seamless stay for you as a solo traveler. We hope we will have the privilege of welcoming you back to Minasi Premium Hotel for another fantastic trip in the future.

Warm regards,
The Management Team
Minasi Premium Hotel

reviews.title: Great
reviews.positives: La chambre étais bien , propre et le personnel très gentille ! Merci à Daisy et sont amie Leylin pour leurs gentillesses durant mon séjour !!
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Tony, Kelly and Harry very good services. I will comeback again in future
reviews.response:
Dear Hoang,

Thank you so much for the perfect 10/10 rating and for choosing Minasi Premium for your 3-night stay in Hanoi!

We are thrilled to hear that you had an "Exceptional" experience with us. A huge thank you from Tony, Kelly, and Harry! They were all delighted to be mentioned by name. Providing dedicated and "very good" service is what we strive for, and knowing their efforts made your stay memorable is the best reward they could ask for.

We are already looking forward to welcoming you and your partner back to our hotel in the near future!

Warm regards,

The Management TeamMinasi Premium Hotel

reviews.title: Hanoï
reviews.positives:
Les chambres étaient propres.
Le personnel était très à l écoute, très agréable.
reviews.negatives: L emplacement,  le personnel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly staffs, I had a great stay
reviews.response:
Dear Janine,

Thank you so much for your "Exceptional" 10/10 rating! We are thrilled to know that your solo journey brought you to Minasi Premium Hotel and that we could provide a perfect home base for your stay in Hanoi.

It is wonderful to hear that you had a great experience across all categories—from our central location to the cleanliness and service. We understand that for solo travelers, a safe, friendly, and welcoming atmosphere is key, and we are so glad our team made you feel right at home. Even in our Superior Room, we strive to ensure every detail is handled with excellence.

Your kind words about our "friendly staffs" have been shared with the entire team. They are all smiling knowing they made your one-night stay so memorable!

We hope Hanoi was a highlight of your trip, and we would be honored to welcome you back anytime your travels bring you back to Vietnam.

reviews.title: Excellent !!!!
reviews.positives: Tout et surtout la gentillesse de l’équipe à la réception toujours prêt à vous aider
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Enjoy
reviews.text: Tony, Magnus and Kelly are friendly
reviews.response:
Dear Soren,

Thank you so much for the perfect 10/10 rating! We are honored that you and your family chose Minasi Premium Hotel for your stay in Hanoi.

Receiving a perfect score across every single category—from Cleanliness and Facilities to Value for Money—is the ultimate compliment for our team. We know that traveling with young children requires extra comfort and convenience, and we are so glad we could provide that "Enjoy" factor for your family.

A big thank you from Tony, Magnus, and Kelly! They were delighted to hear that their friendliness made a positive impact on your stay. They truly enjoy welcoming families and making sure both parents and little ones feel right at home.

We hope you had a wonderful journey back to Sweden, and we would love to welcome your family back again in the future!

reviews.title: Günstiges Stadthotel
reviews.positives: Der Blick vom Frühstücksbereich auf die Stadt ist sehr schön im 12. Stockwerk. Die Rezeption war gut erreichbar und freundlich. Koffer durften vorher ein paar Stunden eingestellt werden. Der Stadtteil ist nicht ganz so laut wie die Altstadt. Die Klimaanlage ist erstaunlich leise und gut gewesen. Zentral-Klimaanlage, nicht so ein überfordertes Zimmergerät.
reviews.negatives:
Günstiges Standardhotel in einer Großstadt. Was soll man da besonderes erwarten, wenn man deutlich wenig bezahlt. Der Eingangsbereich wie immer in Hanoi und erst dahinter kommen die Zimmer mit sehr abgelebter Inneneinrichtung. Blick nach vorne zur Straße, zu laut zum Schlafen, nach hinten ist es hässlich.
Dieses Hotel ist nicht komplett verkehrt aber es ist auf kein Stern unterm Himmel.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay at Minasi
reviews.text: Our stay at Minasi was excellent. Would recommend 10/10. Harry, Magnus and Tony are amazing and very friendly.
reviews.response:
Dear Sandeep,

Thank you very much for your wonderful review.

We are delighted to hear that you had an excellent stay at Minasi Premium Hotel and would recommend us 10/10. Harry, Magnus, and Tony truly appreciate your kind words and are thrilled that you found them friendly and helpful.

We look forward to welcoming you and your family back on your next visit to Hanoi.

Warm regards,
Minasi Premium Hotel Team

reviews.title: Es war ein gelungener Aufenthalt
reviews.positives: Das Frühstück war sehr gut. Sehr viel Auswahl und sehr lecker.
reviews.negatives: Es wirkte nicht ganz so sauber.

reviews.title: One night stay
reviews.text: Hotel was very good located and room was quiet. The room was extremely clean aswell. Staff was friendly Magnus, Kelly and Tony, they helped me with me because i was booked wrong dates first. Issue was solved properly
reviews.response:
Dear Erika,

Thank you very much for your wonderful review!

We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and appreciated our quiet and clean Premium Room, as well as our convenient location. Magnus, Kelly, and Tony will be very happy to know that their assistance with your booking issue made your experience smooth and enjoyable.

We hope to welcome you back to Minasi on your next visit to Hanoi!

Warm regards,
Minasi Premium Team

reviews.title: Clean and friendly hotel.
reviews.text: I stayed for a few days in the Old Quarter and wanted to stay in a quieter place, so I booked 2 nights. It was quiet, clean, and the interior was recently remodeled, making it comfortable. The air conditioning was cool, and there was a smart TV, which made it easy to log in and watch OTT content. The semi-buffet breakfast, although not having a wide variety, had everything you would need and tasted good. I upgraded to a room with a window for an additional fee, but they gave me a discount on the cost.

reviews.title: Bien situé mais un peu cher
reviews.text:
Séjour mitigé ! 
Hôtel bien situé mais si vous logez au 2e étage, les chambres sont peu lumineuses et le personnel fait du bruit des 7h30 devant notre chambre. De plus le petit déjeuner est bien mais à 9h23, le serveur debarasse ton assiette alors que tu as à peine poser tes couverts ... 
Heureusement une des réceptionniste  : Mme Duong Tuyet Nhi nous a aidé quand nous avions besoin ! Encore merci à elle. 
Rapport qualité/prix pas extraordinaire... c'est dommage 
Plusieurs cafards morts dans notre chambre ( sûrement lié aux produits)

reviews.title: 口コミがあてにならないホテル
reviews.text:
思いっきり悪いわけではないが口コミほどのホテルとは思えなかった。
１２時過ぎにホテルに入ったが入室は２時からと待たされた。
これはルールなので問題はないが近隣のホテルはとは違った対応であった。次にアゴダに記載されているバスローブがなかった。アゴダには記載されているよと言うと日本語のページを翻訳確認後持ってきた。部屋は広く快適だが、コンセントの数が少なく、冷蔵庫とテレビを使うと枕もとのコンセントしか使えずにテレビを使わないことにした。シャワーは広く快適だが、排水が極めて良くない。多分古い施設なのにベルトラップの掃除をしていないせいだと思われる。朝食は１２A階の展望レストランでいただく。これ自体は素敵であるが、ほかのレストランのようにエッグステーションがあると思ってオムレツは頼めるか？とスタッフに聞くと目玉焼きを指さしてないとの素振りであった。チェックアウトの時に聞くとエッグステーションはあるとのことであった。
このようにちぐはぐなサービスであった。ハノイでは口コミを意図的に良いように記録してもらおうとフロントスタッフは躍起だが、末端にまでは浸透していない感じであった。

reviews.title: Disappointed. Not worth the money. It costs the same as a 4-star city hotel, but there are actual 4-star hotels that can
reviews.positives:
The location is excellent. Located in the northern part of the old quarter, the streets are not as busy as the southern part. Easy to navigate to any part of Hanoi.
The staff is not the best, but they are very good. Helpful and easy-going. Quickly responded to our queries. Even the hotel manager (or supervisor) had talked to us and helped promptly regarding one of our issues.
reviews.negatives: It is neither a 4-star nor a 3-star hotel. The star rating criteria are not met. The rooms are poorly maintained in terms of cleanliness. No single-use slippers are provided. Used rubber slippers are given, and they are not cleaned after previous use. Only two thin pillows are provided. With one bed liner. We found human hair on the pillows and the bed sheet. The extra bed cover found inside the cupboard is not cleaned and there were stain marks of vomiting. The bed is super uncomfortable (like a stone). The bathroom is clean but the bidet shower was never cleaned. It was disgusting. No overhead shower. Rooms are not soundproofed very well. But it is not that bad. Tye breakfast is below average. Definitely not met with 3-star rating (unless there are following different rating criteria 😄)

reviews.text: Magnus 되게 친절해요 ㅎㅎ 방도 나름 깨끗하고 주변에 편의점도 있고 먹거리도 꽤 많아요 주변도 나름 조용한 편이라 좋아요
reviews.response:
Dear Suhyun,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your wonderful feedback and for giving us a perfect 10.0/10 score across every single category!

We are absolutely thrilled to hear you had such an exceptional 2-night stay in our Deluxe Double or Twin Room as a couple. We will immediately pass along your heartfelt praise to Magnus; he will be over the moon to know his kind, attentive service stood out to you during your trip.

We are also so glad you loved our clean rooms and found our local area convenient with plenty of dining and shopping options nearby. It means the world to our entire team to know we could deliver a seamless, enjoyable stay for you and your partner.

We hope we will have the privilege of welcoming you both back to Minasi Premium Hotel for another fantastic romantic getaway in the future.

Warm regards,
The Management Team
Minasi Premium Hotel

Size of deluxe premium rooms

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Bị ồn bởi tiếng bên ngoài

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very friendly hotel staff! The hotel manager and receptionist Duong were super helpful! We wanted to go to Ha Giang but couldn't reserve a room for when we came back to Hanoi, but Duong and the hotel manager helped us out big time by finding an available room for us. They stored our luggage and ended up checking us in two hours earlier than expected after a long journey to Hanoi. The location is quite good, only a short walk to the old quarter.
reviews.negatives: Our room was located at the 12th floor, so be aware that it's quite noisy in the morning as the breakfast is happening right above you. The room could have been a little more clean - the door had some mold on it. The windows don't shut tight, so bring earplugs if you're noise sensitive. The breakfast is fine, however missing a few options in my opinion. Like most of the beds in Vietnam the mattress is hard.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Dạ phòng sạch sẽ cách âm tốt, kelly nhiệt tình
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ đánh giá. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với phòng nghỉ sạch sẽ, cách âm tốt và có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái tại khách sạn.

Chúng tôi cũng rất trân trọng những lời khen dành cho Kelly. Sự ghi nhận của Quý khách là nguồn động viên lớn đối với đội ngũ của chúng tôi và chắc chắn sẽ được chia sẻ lại với bạn ấy.

Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại Minasi Premium Hotel trong thời gian tới.

Trân trọng,
Ban Quản lý
Minasi Premium Hotel

reviews.title: Nice place to base yourself and great staff!
reviews.positives:
The staff were great super helpful. Lyn had some great suggestions for things to do and was always helpful, as was another man behind the desk. Forgot his name! They made the stay great. 

Hotel is a little run down (only slightly) but it’s ok for the price. Surprisingly quite quiet for the location.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Mọi thứ đều tốt, hoàn toàn hài lòng
reviews.response: Thank you for your meaningful feedback. We are always committed to improve the quality of services and make our clients' experiences memorable.

reviews.title: 3* hotel that would check all the boxes if it was advertised as a three star property
reviews.positives: friendly staff, decent breakfast choice, good access as its outside busiest area
reviews.negatives:
not a 4* hotel, I feel it is misleading as for the guests expectations. 
Missing safety deposit in the room, poor soundproofing, can hear everything from the corridor

reviews.title: Best option for 50$
reviews.text: Good quality, location, breakfast and kind crew. Thank you for all! Also near is the Aplus, reserve a table
reviews.response:
Dear Nikitas,

Thank you so much for the 10/10 rating! We are thrilled that you found Minasi Premium Hotel to be the "best option" and a great value during your solo trip to Hanoi.

It is wonderful to hear that our quality, breakfast, and location met your expectations. Most importantly, our crew sends their warmest thanks to you! They truly enjoyed hosting you and are glad their kindness made a difference in your 2-night stay.

We also appreciate you sharing the tip about Aplus nearby! It’s a popular spot, and your advice to reserve a table will surely be helpful to other travelers looking to enjoy the local nightlife.

We hope to welcome you back from Greece very soon for another high-quality experience!

Best regards,

The Management Team
Minasi Premium Hotel

reviews.title: my stay was quite comfortable and i believe i got value for money during my stay at Minasi Hotel
reviews.positives:
The breakfast was good but there were times when foods served eg sausages, fried eggs and beverages like tea will be finished and not replaced  promptly.

Good if customers entering the restaurant for breakfast can know whether it is bufait or not.
reviews.negatives: customer care was excellent and the front desk was exceptional

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: super noisy hotel, but very good service from the staff

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The staff were very friendly and helpful, and the location was great. The hotel is nice overall but a bit old. The room was comfortable, and Wi-Fi worked perfectly.
reviews.negatives: The bathroom has a bathtub, but the water didn’t drain well and collected a bit. It was clean, though because the facilities are older, it didn’t feel completely fresh. For this price, and even for a bit less, it’s possible to find slightly better places.

reviews.title: Fajny hotel
reviews.text: Nocowaliśmy 2 noce. Hotel w miarę czysty, trochę twarde łóżka, ale co zaskakujące całkiem wygodne, smaczne i bogate śniadania. Rewelacyjny i bardzo pomocny cały personel, a w szczególności chłopaki z restauracji/ kuchni i przesympatyczny Toan😀 Ogólnie oceniłabym hotel na 9.
reviews.response:
Dear Izabela,

Thank you very much for your wonderful review.

We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your 2-night stay at Minasi Premium Hotel. It’s great to know that you found our hotel clean, the beds surprisingly comfortable, and breakfast tasty and varied. Toàn and our restaurant/kitchen team truly appreciate your kind words about their helpful and friendly service.

We are thrilled that you rated your stay 9/10 and look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Hanoi.

Warm regards,
Minasi Premium Hotel Team

reviews.title: Great short stay.
reviews.positives: Very friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Common areas could be much cleaner

reviews.title: Good for solo or couple
reviews.text: The hotel is clean and staff are helpful and friendly. Location is very near the old town. The place is quiet, and good choice.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice staff - good location to explore Hanoi.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great staff, clean rooms and good atmosphere.

reviews.title: Cozy hotel very well located. Thank you Duong Tuyet Nhi!
reviews.positives: We had a wonderful stay at Minasi. The hotel is well located in the Old Quarter and after coming back from Ha Long Bay we stayed there again. The hotel has everything you need and the staff are really kind and helpful, especially Duong Tuyet Nhi, she definitely made us feel at home making sure we were okay and comfortable. Thank you so much!
reviews.negatives: The least thing we enjoyed was probably the breakfast as it didn’t have many options but we went during the Tet Festival which is understandable.

reviews.title: Staff are kind, location is nice, breakfast is good!
reviews.positives:
Location is good, you can reach those tourist attractions of Old Quarter within 15 minutes by a Grab.
The hotel offers various choices of food for breakfast every morning.
reviews.negatives:
A cleaning lady opened the door without asking even we hung up the “Do not disturb” sign on the door handle.
But I guess this kind of thing might not happened often.

reviews.title: Good value for a short stay in Hanoi
reviews.positives: I chose the hotel because of the good value as well as for being located close to the hotel where I would meet the group I would join for the following two weeks. I appreciated the fact that although it was situated in a busy and noisy area, the room was quiet and well insulated.
reviews.negatives: If you are a light sleeper or would like to sleep in make sure your room is not on the 12th floor like mine, as the breakfast room is right above and you can hear all the chairs being dragged on the floor and people getting busy above.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: great location

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice staff and great location, can access the tourist area within 15 minute walk
reviews.negatives: should provide tissue in the room

reviews.title: Good location near old town & comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Good location and lovely staff
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Good choice for your solo trip or business trip in Hanoi, good location
reviews.positives: I spent only 1 night at this hotel during my crazy schedule for business trip in Hanoi. I find the thing I impressed the most was how I welcomed me warmly and cared for me especially once I had to check out early morning to catch the flight, they had to prepare a lovely breakfast for me. Really recommend you can stay here and experience more than 1 night. :))
reviews.negatives: The noise from the upper floor at night which made me uncomfortable (this is not their fault, but I think they should alert the guest to keep quite at the midnight for everyone). The smell at the reception area is sometimes quite annoyed due to the scent (Indian spices or something I didn't know). They should prepare the scent to refresh the air.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The hotel was lovely and I got upgraded to a premium suite which was so lovely since it was my birthday. Within about 10 minutes of being in my room, Joyce, the girl at reception who checked me in rang my bell with a birthday cake and singing happy birthday to me which was very sweet. She was the best part about my stay and even sat with me at breakfast and chatted and gave me great recommendations! Thanks Joyce!
reviews.negatives: The shower pressure was a bit off

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.positives: Staff friendly, helpful and dealt with a communication problem quickly
reviews.negatives:
Room isn’t sound proof, could hear next door people very clearly.
Unless early for breakfast food wasn’t very fresh

reviews.title: Fabulous! Would defenitely stay again ☺️
reviews.positives: The staff were lovely and the facilities were great. Breakfast was also delicious!

reviews.title: Memorable Stay
reviews.positives: Good location. Polite, helpful staff.  Very protective of guests during Cyclone.  Valuable suggestions re eating places, transport etc. Matt the manager was extremely helpful.  Daisy was very proactive and kind.
reviews.negatives: Music and breakfast menus repeated day after day.  Could do with some variation.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff Member Duong Tuyet Nhi was super friendly and helpful. She helped us with all our inquiries and questions.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
We only stayed one night.
Friendly reception 
Good beds and bathroom. 
Good breakfast
Very close to the hidden cocktail bar the other room.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The building was beautiful and Trang Bui was an excellent host!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Magnus and Ella and Kelly are good
Room clean 
Good breakfast

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Exceptional service from Kelly and Ella on the front reception.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Thank Magnus Tony and Kelly so much

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff were exceptional. Clean hotel. Good location.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Tung and Harry Phuong so kind and helpful
breakfast lovely 
room very clean and beautiful

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Magnus and Harry were nice People 
Room and breakfast clean but less option for vegan
Thank them for support free to premium room

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tony , Kelly and Harry are good staff. We love Minasi

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tony， Kelly and Harry always to look after guest

reviews.title: Really good hotel
reviews.positives:
Room clean and high floor and big room
Everything good
Magnus Kelly and Tony friendly and kind
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I was thoroughly impressed by the professionalism of the front desk team. Joyce, Kelly, and Harry were incredibly welcoming and friendly from the moment I arrived. They made check-in quick and easy, setting a great tone for the entire stay and helping me with local recommendations. Exceptional customer service!

reviews.title: Our Hanoi stay
reviews.positives: From the moment we arrived we were warmly greeted by Tony and the reception team, assisting us with our cases and helping us to settle in. Kelly was always on hand to assist us and helped us to book our flights to Hoi An. Minh and Toan in catering team were excellent and extremely friendly. Magnus and Joyce were on duty to say goodbye as we set off for Ha Long Bay. Excellent stay and a great location which allowed us to walk to and from the city centre each day. Would highly recommend this hotel.
reviews.negatives: The lack of sunshine during our stay.

reviews.title: Great place to stay at great value to see all the sights of Hanoi
reviews.positives: The property is in great position to get everywhere, Tony, Joyce and Magnus were great and helpful at front of house and we have been able to leave a bag in their care to pick up at the end of our trip
reviews.negatives: No complaints

reviews.title: Superb
reviews.positives: Magnus was a great receptionist very attentive and friendly. He helped take our luggage up to our room and also helped bring them down.
reviews.negatives: I loved everything about the stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We were really happy with our stay. Tony and Magnus were great and very friendly!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Joyce, Tony, and Harry were absolutely amazing! Great stay!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The room was big, clean and very beautiful, with a comfortable bathroom and lots of space.

I really enjoyed my stay. Kelly and Magnus were especially friendly and made us feel very welcome.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff was wery nice and kind ,thank you to Joyce and Kelly very nice girl.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great rooms and amenities!

reviews.title: It was beyond great
reviews.positives: Everything was great from the beginning. From the way Joyce received us at the start till the very end. They were exceptionally sweet, kind and helpful. All of them, the receptionist, the bell boy, the restaurant manager and the final see off receptionist.
reviews.negatives: The cleanliness, food, comfort….everything

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Beautiful bathroom and clean room, good location. Walking distance of old quarter but quiet at night. Daisy and Magnus were great at reception. Thank you very much

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Daisy and Magnus were great! The room was very comfortable and staff all very friendly.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff were super friendly and helpful. Good selection of hot and cold breakfasts. Great location with a 20 minute walk to the Old Town. Some great local eateries.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.positives: The friendliest staff and we got a room upgrade m, couldn’t recommend this hotel enough.

reviews.title: Very helpful staff with empathy for the needs of the diverse clients as d travellers.
reviews.positives:
The staff were very friendly and did many things to make our stay happy and comfortable. They assisted in booking tours and solving simple problems such as  finding medical advice or shopping needs. The breakfast staff were always ready to give personal attention such as cooking a special omelette and the cleaning staff were helpful and flexible. 
There are very friendly street food and dr  in Kos establishments adjacent and ATM only 100 away. There is also an excellent spa and massage service.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast had good choices for multicultural food but I think adding baked beans as a choice would be helpful accompaniment to eggs or omelettes.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff are very friendly

reviews.title: Truely magnificent
reviews.positives:
All the staff was amazing during my stay at Minasi Premium Hotel, from the moment you walk in to the staff at breakfast. Everyone is here to help you and made my experience even better in Hanoi. 


Would definitely come back again!

reviews.title: A wonderful stay
reviews.positives:
This is my second stay in Minasi premium hotel and it lives up to its premium name. The staff is exceptional providing amazing service and friendliness specifically Joyce. 

It’s located next to many local restaurants and coffee shops. Very good breakfast with fruits every morning.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The hotel exceeded my expectations. The rooms were clean and spacious, and the bed was one of the most comfortable beds I've slept on. The staff are courteous and helpful. The location is quite central, and I loved how food, cafes, and shopping are all just 5 minutes' walk away. The hotel ticked all my boxes and more!

reviews.title: Great
reviews.positives: Friendly helpful staff, good location very close to the old town

reviews.title: Will choose again if come backs
reviews.positives: Very nice location with walk distance basically to everywhere, helpful staff and fresh breakfast

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great location, close to everything. Very clean hotel and super friendly staff. All staff could speak English, so communication wasn't an issue. We had a very comfortable stay.

reviews.title: totally perfect!! Love Vietnam!!
reviews.positives:
Good breakfast, good price, good location, good staffs (especially, Ms.Trang and Mr.Hoangg!), good service!
This hotel kept us comfortable and relieved during the stay, thank you.
reviews.negatives: Sometimes there was no hot water in the showers in our room.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.positives: The hotel's opulence was matched by the warmth and professionalism of the staff, who made me feel truly welcome. If you're looking for a top-tier accommodation in an excellent location with exceptional service, this is the place to stay.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.positives: Great hotel, friendly staff and clean room!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: everything is perfect

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.positives: The staff are friendly and willing to help and the hotel is well located near the Old Town, within easy walking distance of the lake. What a great experience here

reviews.title: Great
reviews.positives: I liked everything about the Minasi Hanoioi Hotel. The staff were friendly and very helpful Great breakfast and on a nice quiet Rd. Excellent location. I'd stay here again without a doubt.

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.positives: Perfect place to stay in Hanoi. The location and amenities in and around the hotel are great. The hotel staff are excellent and always there to assist

reviews.title: SO great
reviews.positives: Staff are exceptional!! The service we received was not describable it was that amazing. Would definitely stay here agai

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
It is so close to the lake and all the main attractions 
The staff are lovely , helpful.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Spacious room
Comfortable bed
Peaceful location but can easily walk to the lake and old town.
Good service

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Good location near to the old part of town and lake
Friendly staff
Decent breakfast
Clean and fresh
Fantastic AC in the ceiling

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff is great : patient and professional. Always ready to help. Thank you

reviews.title: Excelente excepto el desayuno
reviews.positives: Muy buen hotel, con excelente atención
reviews.negatives: El desayuno es muy pobre, el café intomable
